chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3236 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on M.A No.3924/19. For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 23-04-2019. Mr. Rizwan Ahmed, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl: Advocate General. = Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the matter at some length, does not wish to press this petition and submits that he would avail remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
